issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The effect checks if the Leader has a type, not if a card exists on board.
Target scope should be 'ChooseCharacter' (your own characters) not 'ChooseOpponentCharacter'. The card says 'return...to the owner's hand' implying your own Characters.

condition.value: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
